notes: Curated character-weapon FAMILY profiles. Per-weapon data (system.damage / system.damageType) remains the SSOT for formula and type; these profiles supply the packet v2 axes (delivery/attackShape/tags) a family shares.
Full per-weapon classification lives in docs/audits/generated/damage-profile-audit.json (regenerate with node tools/audit-damage-profiles.mjs).
Lightsaber DR bypass is tag-based ('lightsaber'), never inferred from energy type.

profiles.name: Standard weapon attack
notes: Default profile: type/formula come from weapon.system.damageType / system.damage.

profiles.name: Lightsaber family
notes: The 'lightsaber' tag is what bypasses DR; it does NOT bypass energy resistance or immunity.
Applies to entries with the Lightsaber property, lightsaber subtype/chassis, or lightsabers pack membership.

profiles.name: Autofire-capable weapon (mode overlay)
notes: Weapons with the Autofire property. Firing on autofire overlays the areaProfile 'autofire' shape; Burst Fire feat overlays 'burst-fire'.
Mode is a workflow overlay, never a permanent item rewrite.

profiles.name: Stun setting (mode overlay)

riders.notes: Condition-track consequence resolves as a rider, not a damage component.

notes: Workflow override to type 'stun' while the mode is active (resolveDamagePacketType already handles this).

riders.notes: Ion condition-track behavior vs. droids/vehicles resolves as a rider.

profiles.name: Grenade (weapon-backed burst)
notes: Type/formula stay per-item (frag kinetic, ion grenade ion, CryoBan cold…). Non-damage grenades (adhesive) become riders later.

profiles.name: Slugthrower / projectile family
notes: Name/property-based family grouping ('Projectile' property, slug pistols/rifles). Per-item damageType already says kinetic; family tag needs review before any rule hooks on it.
